channel.title: Prep Plate Weekly
channel.description: Fresh takes for busy professionals who meal prep.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in macros with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest macros adjustments that busy professionals who meal prep report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: freezer friendly lunches
item.description: The persistent myths around freezer friendly lunches, stress-tested against what busy professionals who meal prep actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your recipes in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying recipes project for busy professionals who meal prep — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/slowcooking is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the tools community this week.

item.title: The macros checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified macros purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of freezer
item.description: The most common early stumbles in freezer, and the cheap corrections that fix them for busy professionals who meal prep.

item.title: "batch cooking guide" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about batch cooking guide through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your tools questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the tools questions busy professionals who meal prep keep asking, minus the hedging.
